description: Generate a publication-quality scientific schematic (treatment-pathway flowchart, care-coordination diagram, etc.) from a natural-language prompt using Nano Banana 2 via OpenRouter, with smart iterative quality review.
rules: requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and the requests library
makes outbound network calls to the OpenRouter API
usage: Set SCHEMATIC_PROMPT (diagram description) and DOC_TYPE; export OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: schematic.png.
limitation: NOT hermetic: needs a live OPENROUTER_API_KEY, the requests library, and network access. Offline (or without a key) the porter degrades to a fallback marker file and still records the audit line, but no real image is produced.
